title: Kindred
author: Octavia E. Butler
publisher: and quickly' The Pool Nineteenth-century Maryland is a very dangerous place for a black woman - but Dana has no choice but to go there
description: Octavia E. Butler's 1979 masterpiece and ground-breaking exploration of power and responsibility, for fans of The Handmaid's Tale, The Power and Yaa Gyasi's Homegoing. subjects: the more aware she is that her own life might be over before it's even begun. This is the extraordinary story of two people bound by blood
notes: separated by so much more than time - and confronting the inescapable ties between past and present."
